Translated_comment: I work while traveling - these are the most comfortable headphones! The noise reduction in the plane works like a charm, charging is enough for a long flight.
Original_comment: Працюю в подорожах - це найзручніші навушники! Шумозаглушення в літаку працює чарівно, зарядки вистачає на довгий переліт.

Translated_comment: AirPods Pro 2 (USB-C) are the best TWS for iPhone. Yes, they are expensive, but for this money you get:  The best ANC in its class,  Perfect integration with iOS (instant switching, "Find iPhone" for each headphone),  Water resistance and fantastic comfort. USB-C has finally united the charging of all devices. If the budget allows - take without thinking!

Да, они дорогие, но за эти деньги вы получаете:  Лучшее ANC в своем классе,  Идеальную интеграцию с iOS (мгновенное переключение, «Найти iPhone» для каждого наушника),  Водостойкость и фантастический комфорт. USB-C наконец-то объединил зарядку всех устройств. Если бюджет позволяет – берите не задумываясь!

Translated_comment: Noisemaker is magic. Only music can be heard in the subway, no extraneous sounds. Switched to USB-C - now I charge with the MacBook. The sound is clear, the bass is soft, and Transparency Mode is like listening to everything around you without distortion.

Translated_comment: The best wireless headphones! I have been using it for 4 months, the sound is excellent, the noise canceler works flawlessly in the subway. USB-C charging is convenient.

Translated_comment: Ideal for sports! They do not fall out of the ears, they are not afraid of sweat. The transparency feature lets you hear your surroundings while running.

Translated_comment: I use it for work calls - the microphone is clear, I can be heard perfectly. Noise reduction in the office simply saves! Type-C charging is more convenient.

Translated_comment: AirPods Pro 2 are not just headphones, but a technological masterpiece. The H2 chip provides lightning-fast switching between devices and stunning spatial sound. ANC now blocks even more low frequencies - the subway is as quiet as a library. USB-C is a logical and long-awaited update!

ANC теперь блокирует даже больше низких частот – в метро тихо, как в библиотеке. USB-C – логичное и долгожданное обновление!

Translated_comment: I have been using it for a month - full of delight! The noise canceler works flawlessly, the sound is clear and deep. Autonomy has improved compared to the first version.

Translated_comment: Switched from AirPods Pro 1 to the second generation - the difference is noticeable! Noise canceling has become 30-40% more effective, the sound is more detailed, and the case with USB-C is what was missing. If you choose between them, you should definitely take the new version.

Translated_comment: AirPods Pro 2 with USB-C is convenience in every detail. Transparent mode is now even more natural - everything is heard as if nothing is in the ears. The battery lasts for 6 hours with ANC, and up to 30 hours with the case. Sensory volume control on the stem is brilliant!

Translated_comment: These are the best headphones I've ever owned! The noise cancellation works perfectly, the sound is clear and voluminous. A case with USB-C is convenient.

Translated_comment: I bought airpods about 2 and they are super quiet, they work great, the sound is clear and the bass is good, usb-c is now possible to charge everything with one cable

Translated_comment: AirPods Pro 2 is a new level of wireless headphones! The updated system of active noise reduction is like magic: in the subway or in a cafe, all background noise simply disappears. The sound became even clearer, with good bass. And USB-C is finally the convenience of charging together with other gadgets. They fit so comfortably in my ears that sometimes I forget they're there.
Original_comment: AirPods Pro 2 – це новий рівень бездротових навушників! Оновлена система активного шумозаглушення – як магія: у метро чи в кафе просто зникає весь фоновий шум. Звук став ще чистішим, з гарними басами. А USB-C – це нарешті зручність зарядки разом з іншими гаджетами. Вони так комфортно сидять у вухах, що іноді забуваю, що вони там є.
